prompt: Haunting underwater photograph, deep ocean, a vast school of translucent plastic bags drifting in perfect fish-like formation through dark teal water, each bag catching bioluminescent light, no real fish visible anywhere, only plastic mimicking life, rays of cold light filtering down from distant surface, photorealistic, cinematic depth, emotional and eerie, no text, no labels, no charts
dataset_name: Ellen MacArthur Foundation — The New Plastics Economy: Rethinking the Future of Plastics
insight: By 2050, the ocean will contain more plastic by weight than fish, as annual plastic leakage reaches 80 million tonnes.
